note: Synthetic validation is stored separately from event-time replay evidence and must not be visible to generation or ranking steps.

rows.label: partial
rows.expected_observable: The stock underperforms cybersecurity peers over the next 20 trading days.
rows.what_happened: Synthetic replay: LYRA continued to underperform cybersecurity peers, but the cause was not yet fully separable from broader sector weakness.

rows.label: validated
rows.expected_observable: Analysts cut net retention or billings quality assumptions within 30 days.
rows.what_happened: Synthetic replay: renewal discounting pressure became the validated narrative as later estimate notes focused on net retention and billings quality.

rows.label: pending
rows.expected_observable: Follow-up commentary focuses on enterprise renewal concessions.
rows.what_happened: Synthetic replay: left pending to show that consensus tracking should not force every validation window into a binary label.
